products.title: Amada Fluted Nightstands with Charging Station, End Table with USB Ports & AC Outlets, Wood Side Table for Bedroom, Deep Drawer & Storage Shelf, Set of 1, Natural Oak

metrics.sku: Color: Natural Oak | Number of Items: 1

bullets: 【Smart Storage Design】This fluted bedside table masterfully blends style and function. The open top shelf offers easy access to daily essentials, while the deep drawer keeps personal items discreetly stored. Its grooved texture adds a contemporary touch—ideal for bedrooms with limited space at the headboard, helping you achieve a clutter-free space.

【Multi-Scene Versatility】With compact dimensions of 15.6" D x 17.6" W x 22.8" H, this nightstand adapts seamlessly to multiple settings: use it as a bedside companion in the bedroom, a chic side table in the living room, or a stylish accent in the hallway. Its clean design and neutral finish harmonize effortlessly with any interior style.

【Built-in Charging Hub】Equipped with 2 AC outlets (125V/12A), 1 USB-A (5V/2A), 1 USB-C (5V/2A) ports, this smart nightstand powers all your devices at once. The integrated charging hub organizes cords neatly—a smart, functional upgrade for any tech-friendly bedroom.

【Premium Eco-Friendly Material】Crafted from P2-grade engineered wood that meets CARB Phase 2 standards, this nightstand features a scratch-resistant and water-repellent natural finish. The grooved detailing and sleek metal handle enhance durability while delivering a refined, contemporary look.

【Effortless Assembly】Includes clear illustrated instructions, labeled components, and all necessary tools. Whether you're new to DIY or a seasoned pro, you'll enjoy a smooth and satisfying assembly experience—designed to be frustration-free.

products.title: SICOTAS Night Stand Set of 2 Nightstands with Drawer Storage Fluted Bed Side Table End Table Large Modern Wide Bedside Stand Mid Century Night Stands for Bedroom Living R

bullets: 【Larger & Wider Size】- Overall dimensions: 15.4"D x 22.7"W x 24.1"H. Our large nightstand provides ample storage space for all your bedside essentials. From books and reading glasses to electronic devices and personal items, everything can find its place within this spacious night stand. With its roomy desktop, large drawer, and open compartment, our bedside table allows you to keep your belongings tidy and within reach.

【Minimalist & Practical】- Our bed side table boasts a minimalist curve profile and a drawer with a unique waveform panel, perfectly balancing modern aesthetics with functional design. The chic appearance complements various bedroom styles, from contemporary to mid-century modern. The smooth lines and rounded corners make it safe for kids and families, creating a standout piece that elevates the ambiance of your room.

【Sturdy & Durable】- Crafted with a thickened high-quality board and scratch-proof, water-resistant surfaces, this end table is built to withstand daily use and remain a reliable companion for years to come. The frame is made of FSC-Certified engineered wood. The sturdy construction ensures stability and durability, making it a practical and long-lasting addition to your bedroom.

【Multiple Applications】- This 2-tier night stand is not only perfect for a bedside table in bedrooms but also ideal as an end table or side table next to your sofa, couch, or armchair in your living room, hallway, or office. Additionally, it can serve as a toy storage solution in the nursery. It brings a clean and crisp charm to any room it graces.

【Easy to Assemble】- Our nightstand comes with clear and detailed assembly instructions, making it easy to set up without any hassle. We are dedicated to providing you with professional customer service before and after your purchase.

【Color Variation Notice】- Slight Color Variations May Occur Due To Material Batches, Manufacturing Processes, Or Display Settings. These Are Normal And Do Not Impact Quality. Thank You For Your Understanding.

items.title: Hermosassss
items.content: ¡Perfecto! Aquí tienes una reseña de 5 estrellas en inglés para el producto SICOTAS Set of 2 Nightstands en estilo Amazon: --- Stylish and Functional — Perfect for My Bedroom! I'm so impressed with this set of SICOTAS nightstands! They look even better in person — sleek, modern, and with a beautiful mid-century design. The fluted front detail adds a nice elegant touch, and the wide surface gives me plenty

items.title: Sturdy, Stylish, and Easy to Assemble – Great Value for the Price!
items.content: I was pleasantly surprised by the quality of these nightstands! The grey color is exactly what I was hoping for and fits perfectly with my room's aesthetic. The build quality is excellent—once assembled, they're sturdy and don't wobble or feel loose. It's all one solid piece when you push or move it, which is something you don't always get with furniture. Assembly was super easy; I put one together in about an hour a

items.title: Nice night stands!!
items.content: So far so good. These night stands are beautiful. They were super easy to out together. Instructions were very clear. I'll update once I see how well they hold up but first impressions 10/10

items.title: Fabulous nightstands for the WIN!
items.content: These nightstands were so cute, that I ended up also purchasing the matching dresser. They are very lightweight and sturdy and do not take up a ton of room. They fit perfectly aligned with the height of my bed and really feel like the quality aligns with the price. Easy to construct. Highly recommend.

items.title: East assembly
items.content: Simple assembly , looks beautiful and sturdy

items.title: GOOD SET BUT LOOK CHEAP
items.content: This set of two nightstands requires self-assembly, which takes about 1-2 hours for one person. All the parts and hardware were included. I really like the rounded corner design of these nightstands, which was the main reason I chose to purchase them. I bought the ivory color, which is more of an off-white beige. However, the actual product looks cheaper than it does in the photos posted the website. The drawer has a

items.title: Very pretty and spacious
items.content: These are exactly as pictured. Large surface, deep drawer, and the open shelf fits books and a basket. Assembly took me about an hour each.

items.title: Great value set
items.content: For the price of one nightstand elsewhere you get two, and they look far more expensive than they are.

items.title: Good but heavy boxes
items.content: Quality is good and they match our bed frame. Just be aware the boxes are heavy — get help moving them upstairs.

items.title: Perfect mid-century look
items.content: The fluted drawer front is gorgeous. Sturdy after assembly, no wobble.

items.title: Love them
items.content: Bought for a guest room, everyone compliments them. Would buy again.

items.title: Nice but instructions could be better
items.content: Look great in person. A few steps in the instructions were confusing, but got there in the end.

items.title: Solid and stylish
items.content: Very solid once assembled. The wide top easily holds a lamp, phone, books and a drink.

crossAnalysis.summary: 四个ASIN同处床头柜/边桌类目但定位分层明显:SICOTAS双只装(B0CQJZ8XQG)以AC标+690条评论承接自然与广告流量,是体量型对手;mopio走高客单模块化收纳,类目心智偏dresser;SICOTAS加大款上架较新、评论少。我司(AMADA)单只装、带充电站,当前销量与评论体量均最小,短板在Listing转化与社会证明,长板在充电功能与小空间适配。
actions: 先修Listing转化:标题前80字符加入USB-C与尺寸,五点前置承重/线长/插座位置,再放大广告。
用「充电站+176lb承重+轻量安装」做差异化拦截Set of 2竞品流量,避开与mopio比容量。
投放充电/小空间/USB-C长尾词,减少与高评论竞品正面比价。
围绕价格、Coupon、A+、视频、评论增长做周度复盘,持续跟踪竞品AC标与Deal档期。

rows.label: 五点描述原文
values: 【Smart Storage Design】This fluted bedside table masterfully blends style and function. The open top shelf offers easy access to daily essentials, while the deep drawer keeps personal items discreetly stored. Its grooved texture adds a contemporary touch—ideal for bedrooms with limited space at the headboard, helping you achieve a clutter-free space.

【Multi-Scene Versatility】With compact dimensions of 15.6" D x 17.6" W x 22.8" H, this nightstand adapts seamlessly to multiple settings: use it as a bedside companion in the bedroom, a chic side table in the living room, or a stylish accent in the hallway. Its clean design and neutral finish harmonize effortlessly with any interior style.

【Built-in Charging Hub】Equipped with 2 AC outlets (125V/12A), 1 USB-A (5V/2A), 1 USB-C (5V/2A) ports, this smart nightstand powers all your devices at once. The integrated charging hub organizes cords neatly—a smart, functional upgrade for any tech-friendly bedroom.

【Premium Eco-Friendly Material】Crafted from P2-grade engineered wood that meets CARB Phase 2 standards, this nightstand features a scratch-resistant and water-repellent natural finish. The grooved detailing and sleek metal handle enhance durability while delivering a refined, contemporary look.

【Effortless Assembly】Includes clear illustrated instructions, labeled components, and all necessary tools. Whether you're new to DIY or a seasoned pro, you'll enjoy a smooth and satisfying assembly experience—designed to be frustration-free.

【Larger & Wider Size】- Overall dimensions: 15.4"D x 22.7"W x 24.1"H. Our large nightstand provides ample storage space for all your bedside essentials. From books and reading glasses to electronic devices and personal items, everything can find its place within this spacious night stand. With its roomy desktop, large drawer, and open compartment, our bedside table allows you to keep your belongings tidy and within reach.

【Minimalist & Practical】- Our bed side table boasts a minimalist curve profile and a drawer with a unique waveform panel, perfectly balancing modern aesthetics with functional design. The chic appearance complements various bedroom styles, from contemporary to mid-century modern. The smooth lines and rounded corners make it safe for kids and families, creating a standout piece that elevates the ambiance of your room.

【Sturdy & Durable】- Crafted with a thickened high-quality board and scratch-proof, water-resistant surfaces, this end table is built to withstand daily use and remain a reliable companion for years to come. The frame is made of FSC-Certified engineered wood. The sturdy construction ensures stability and durability, making it a practical and long-lasting addition to your bedroom.

【Multiple Applications】- This 2-tier night stand is not only perfect for a bedside table in bedrooms but also ideal as an end table or side table next to your sofa, couch, or armchair in your living room, hallway, or office. Additionally, it can serve as a toy storage solution in the nursery. It brings a clean and crisp charm to any room it graces.

【Easy to Assemble】- Our nightstand comes with clear and detailed assembly instructions, making it easy to set up without any hassle. We are dedicated to providing you with professional customer service before and after your purchase.

【Color Variation Notice】- Slight Color Variations May Occur Due To Material Batches, Manufacturing Processes, Or Display Settings. These Are Normal And Do Not Impact Quality. Thank You For Your Understanding.

颜色实物与页面一致性(ivory偏米白)(证据: GOOD SET BUT LOOK CHEAP: I bought the ivory color, which is )
Amazon评论模块要求账户验证;卖家精灵评论分析未创建报告,无法输出真实评论聚类
更清晰的安装标注与更快的缺件补发(证据: Assembly process was difficult.: it was not clearly marked. )

rows.label: 策略建议
values: 高销量竞品用AC标+高评论承接自然/广告流量;我司应先修Listing转化,再投充电/小空间/USB-C长尾词
竞品以Set of 2+AC标承接大流量;我司单只SKU应打「充电站+小空间」差异化,避开正面比价。
mopio走高客单模块化收纳路线,与我司目标人群部分重叠;我司主打床头场景+充电,不与其比容量。
竞品缺充电功能,我司可在广告与A+中直接对比「充电站+轻量安装」优势拦截其流量。

sopMatrix.sop: Excel内嵌缩略图;HTML可点击打开大图。
变体数来自卖家精灵;销量占比按当前4个ASIN样本计算。

sopMatrix.attr: 卖家(店铺)名称信息(通过天眼查等)
sopMatrix.sop: 卖家精灵给出公司主体;天眼查/企查查仅适用于中国主体进一步验证。
用卖家精灵averagePrice作为近30天成交均价代理。
Amazon口径:按同一末级类目/小类Top样本月销量汇总为分母,品牌月销量为分子。
Amazon口径:按同一末级类目/小类Top样本月销量汇总为分母,当前ASIN月销量为分子。
LLM按Alexa/Rufus检索心智输出优点/缺点/改进三段。
LLM按Alexa/Rufus检索心智输出优点/缺点/改进三段。

sopMatrix.attr: 好评点/差评点/未被满足需求
sopMatrix.sop: 每条聚类必须带评论原文证据引用;无真实评论数据时如实标注不可用,不编造。
套图缩略图可点开大图;推荐商品取Amazon前台推荐位可解析的ASIN。
LLM基于市场指标+VOC产出;单产品一句可执行建议。
